name: Cooper-Standard Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I Cooper-Standard Holdings Inc. (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, the Company, Cooper Standard, we, our or us) is a leading manufacturer of sealing systems and fluid handling systems (consisting of fuel and brake delivery systems and fluid transfer systems). Our products are primarily designed for passenger vehicles and light trucks that are manufactured by global automotive original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and replacement markets.
